deep_dive.title: GeoDisaster: Benchmarking Orchestrated Agents for Operational Disaster Geo-Intelligence
deep_dive.abstract: Remote-sensing vision-language models (RS-VLMs) have advanced Earth-observation analysis toward visual interpretation and instruction-following, yet fall short of operational geo-intelligence, which demands tool-grounded spatial reasoning and structured, evidence-backed decisions. We introduce GeoDisaster, an operational geospatial disaster reasoning benchmark with 2,921 verified instances across 43 question types and five task families: deforestation monitoring, multi-hazard analysis, building-damage assessment, flood-safe routing, and Sentinel-1 SAR flood monitoring. Instances integrate heterogeneous EO/GIS evidence-optical and SAR imagery, raster masks, vector geometries, road networks, and exposure layers-spanning hazard detection, damage assessment, exposure estimation, and diagnostic report generation. Ground-truth answers are grounded in executable geospatial workflows and deterministic consistency checks, removing the need for language-model annotation. We further propose an orchestrated multi-agent framework with 18 disaster-oriented tools, where role-specialized agents coordinate through explicit execution contracts, aligned via Role-Contract Expectation Alignment (RCEA): failure-aware supervised fine-tuning combined with contract-grounded reinforcement learning over dense step-level signals. Experiments show that GeoDisaster challenges existing RS-VLMs and agentic systems, while RCEA improves tool use, evidence grounding, state consistency, and decision generation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 多模态遥感基准，整合光学与SAR等数据
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 多模态遥感基准，整合光学与SAR等数据
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 多模态遥感基准，整合光学与SAR等数据
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces GeoDisaster, a benchmark for multi-modal remote sensing disaster geo-intelligence, directly relevant to multi-modal data fusion.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对遥感视觉语言模型在操作化地理智能上的不足，提出GeoDisaster基准，包含2921个实例，涉及光学、SAR、矢量等多模态数据。该基准支持多任务评估（如洪水监测、建筑损伤评估），为多模态遥感融合研究提供了标准化测试平台。其多源数据整合方法对缺失模态学习也具有启示意义。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对遥感视觉语言模型在操作化地理智能上的不足，提出GeoDisaster基准，包含2921个实例，涉及光学、SAR、矢量等多模态数据。该基准支持多任务评估（如洪水监测、建筑损伤评估），为多模态遥感融合研究提供了标准化测试平台。其多源数据整合方法对缺失模态学习也具有启示意义。

quick_skim.title: Reinforcement Learning-Guided Retrieval with Soft Fusion for Robust Multimodal Imitation Learning under Missing Modalities
quick_skim.abstract: Robotic systems perceive the world through multiple input modalities -- including visual camera streams and natural language instructions -- and must select appropriate actions based on these signals. However, assuming the permanent availability of all input devices is unrealistic, as sensors may fail, become occluded, or drop out entirely during deployment. Robust handling of such missing-modality scenarios is therefore essential for real-world robot operation. This paper introduces RL4IL, a reinforcement learning guided method for imitation learning that selects the most suitable action for a given observation by identifying the most relevant expert demonstrations from a training library. A reinforcement learning policy, trained via Proximal Policy Optimisation over Breadth-First Search candidate sets, ranks candidate demonstrations and a soft cross-attention fusion head aggregates their action signals to produce the final prediction. When a modality is missing at inference time, a dedicated per-modality RL retrieval policy identifies donor demonstrations from the training library, and a soft imputation head reconstructs the missing embedding via cross-attention over the top-ranked donors -- without requiring any retraining of the system. Experiments on three LIBERO benchmark suites demonstrate that RL4IL substantially outperforms state-of-the-art imitation learning methods under sensor dropout conditions, while requiring no policy network training. The code can be found at https://github.com/h-ismkhan/Reinforcement-Learning-via-kNN-for-Robotic-Learning-with-Missing-Camera
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Robust multimodal imitation learning under missing modalities using RL-guided retrieval and soft fusion
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于强化学习引导的检索与软融合，应对缺失模态的鲁棒多模态模仿学习
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于强化学习引导的检索与软融合，应对缺失模态的鲁棒多模态模仿学习
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于强化学习引导的检索与软融合，应对缺失模态的鲁棒多模态模仿学习
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes RL-guided retrieval and soft fusion for robust imitation learning when modalities are missing, applicable to multimodal learning in remote sensing.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对机器人多模态感知中传感器缺失的现实问题，本文提出RL4IL框架，通过强化学习引导的专家演示检索和软融合策略，在缺失模态下仍然选择合适动作。该方法利用强化学习从训练库中识别最相关的演示，并通过软融合集成多模态信息。实验证明该方法在缺失模态场景下显著提升鲁棒性，为遥感图像中缺失模态学习提供了可迁移的深度学习方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对机器人多模态感知中传感器缺失的现实问题，本文提出RL4IL框架，通过强化学习引导的专家演示检索和软融合策略，在缺失模态下仍然选择合适动作。该方法利用强化学习从训练库中识别最相关的演示，并通过软融合集成多模态信息。实验证明该方法在缺失模态场景下显著提升鲁棒性，为遥感图像中缺失模态学习提供了可迁移的深度学习方法。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: explore deep learning approaches for handling missing modalities in multimodal remote sensing images

quick_skim.title: Parameter-Efficient Adapter Tuning for Tabular-Image Multimodal Learning
quick_skim.abstract: Tabular-image multimodal learning aims to improve predictive modeling by jointly using structured tabular attributes and visual data. Although pretrained encoders provide strong modality-specific representations, full fine-tuning can be computationally expensive, while keeping encoders frozen may limit task-specific adaptation. We propose the Tabular-Image Adapter (TI-Adapter), a modality-specific adapter-based fine-tuning framework for efficient multimodal adaptation. TI-Adapter freezes the pretrained tabular encoder and learns an adapter after the extracted tabular embedding, while adapting the image branch with embedding-level and bottleneck-level adapters instead of full fine-tuning. Experiments on 20 tabular-image datasets show that TI-Adapter achieves competitive or better predictive performance than full fine-tuning while using substantially fewer trainable parameters. Ablation studies further demonstrate the importance of adapter placement for balancing performance and practical efficiency.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Parameter-efficient adapter tuning for tabular-image multimodal learning, a general fusion method
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 针对表格-图像多模态学习的参数高效适配器微调，一种通用融合方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 针对表格-图像多模态学习的参数高效适配器微调，一种通用融合方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 针对表格-图像多模态学习的参数高效适配器微调，一种通用融合方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes TI-Adapter for efficient multimodal fusion of tabular and image data, potentially applicable to remote sensing data fusion.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对表格与图像多模态学习微调计算昂贵的问题，本文提出TI-Adapter框架，冻结预训练编码器并仅学习模态特定适配层，实现参数高效的多模态融合。在20个数据集上验证了其有效性。该方法为多模态遥感数据融合提供了一种可迁移的高效微调策略。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对表格与图像多模态学习微调计算昂贵的问题，本文提出TI-Adapter框架，冻结预训练编码器并仅学习模态特定适配层，实现参数高效的多模态融合。在20个数据集上验证了其有效性。该方法为多模态遥感数据融合提供了一种可迁移的高效微调策略。

quick_skim.title: Multi-Modal Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Network with Mixture of Experts for Soil Organic Carbon Prediction
quick_skim.abstract: Top-soil organic carbon (SOC) prediction is fundamental to agricultural sustainability, land use policy and fertilization planning. Existing approaches face two limitations: they pair hand-crafted covariates with classical ML or single-modal deep models that miss rich spectral and temporal information, and grid-based architectures ignore the irregular spatial structure of field measurements. We introduce SpTGNN, a multi-modal spatio-temporal graph neural network addressing both. SpTGNN represents soil measurements as nodes in a heterogeneous graph with three edge types (spatial proximity, spectral similarity, elevation), and applies relational graph attention to learn separate patterns per relation. A fine-tuned TerraMind encoder extracts node features from Sentinel-2, Sentinel-1 and DEM signals, combined with per-sample environmental covariates and learned positional and temporal embeddings. A sparse Mixture-of-Experts module fuses the four streams via top-$k$ routing. Uncertainty is captured by pairing heteroscedastic regression (aleatoric) with deep ensembles (epistemic), and a Moran's $I$ penalty regularizes spatial autocorrelation. We evaluate on a global SOC corpus split into three regional instances ($\sim$49k samples globally, Africa $\sim$26k, Europe $\sim$14k). Our 5-member deep ensemble reports $R^2=0.762$, RMSE $=3.51\pm0.48$ g/kg and MAPE $=22.9\%$ on the Africa test split, improving over a tabular XGBoost baseline; the best single checkpoint reaches validation $R^2=0.864$. Ablations confirm the heterogeneous graph, MoE fusion and fine-tuned backbone each contribute substantively, and the ensemble UQ stack achieves post-calibration ECE of $0.031$ (hybrid) and $0.026$ ($β$-NLL). To our knowledge, this is the first framework to unify foundation-model feature extraction, heterogeneous graph attention and decomposed uncertainty quantification for SOC estimation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multi-modal spatio-temporal fusion for soil carbon prediction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 多模态时空融合用于土壤有机碳预测
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 多模态时空融合用于土壤有机碳预测
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 多模态时空融合用于土壤有机碳预测
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a multi-modal spatio-temporal graph neural network for soil organic carbon prediction, fusing spectral, spatial, and elevation data.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对土壤有机碳预测中单模态模型忽略光谱和时空信息的问题，提出多模态时空图神经网络SpTGNN。该方法将土壤测量点构建为异构图，融合空间邻近、光谱相似和高程三种关系，并采用关系图注意力机制学习不同模式。实验表明该方法优于单模态模型，为多模态遥感数据融合提供了有效框架。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对土壤有机碳预测中单模态模型忽略光谱和时空信息的问题，提出多模态时空图神经网络SpTGNN。该方法将土壤测量点构建为异构图，融合空间邻近、光谱相似和高程三种关系，并采用关系图注意力机制学习不同模式。实验表明该方法优于单模态模型，为多模态遥感数据融合提供了有效框架。
